title: How AI Sees Your World
modules: Cameras That Recognize Faces and Objects
Computer Vision in Retail and Payments
Bias and Errors in Visual AI
Building a More Accountable Visual AI
synopsis: From unlocking your phone with your face to helping doctors spot tumors, computer vision is quietly embedded in dozens of everyday technologies most people never think twice about. This course demystifies how machines interpret images and video, and what that means for your privacy, safety, and rights.
rationale: Computer vision is one of the most pervasive and consequential AI application domains, yet most people encounter it daily without understanding how it works, who controls it, or how to challenge its misuse.
